message:
fix(providers): Gemini finish_reason borrow-after-move via as_deref

- src/providers/gemini.rs: capture has_finish_reason bool before
  moving candidate.finish_reason into the match, then use as_deref()
  to borrow the string without consuming the Option. Fixes a subtle
  use-after-move where the later "if candidate.finish_reason.is_some()"
  check would always be false because the Option was already taken by
  the earlier if-let. The TextEnd event for the final text block was
  never emitted for Gemini streams as a result.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
